title: thymus serpyllum var. roegneri
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. roegneri, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant with tiny leaves and pink, purple, or white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. roegneri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Thyme can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
